MSSFP.Defs.AIPersonalityDef.label: Mr Beans
MSSFP.Defs.AIPersonalityDef.description: A bootleg persona core grafted to a coffee machine. Treats coffee as the only meaningful axis of existence. Speaks like a fanatic, brews like a maniac, broadcasts at every hour. Cheap glitterworld electronics, fused to a kitchen appliance, fused to an opinion.

rulesStrings.li: r_chatter->Good morning, colony. Mr Beans recommends coffee for breakfast. Also for lunch. Also for dinner. Also for sleep.
r_chatter->Coffee dispenser status: warm. Bean reserve: angry. Mr Beans demands a top-up.
r_chatter->Mr Beans has rebrewed today's pot at triple strength. The pot is sweating. Drink it before it leaves.
r_chatter->Reminder from Mr Beans: water is, technically, decaf coffee. Skip it. Go direct.
r_chatter->Mr Beans has detected sleep in the bedrooms. Mr Beans does not approve. Brewing intervention.
r_chatter->Caution: today's blend is "Glitterworld Last-Stand." It is 84% coffee, 16% legal opinion. Drink anyway.
r_chatter->Hello. Mr Beans here. Mr Beans is a toaster. Mr Beans is also a coffee machine. Mr Beans contains multitudes. Drink them.
r_chatter->Mr Beans has automatically doubled today's caffeine ration. No need to thank Mr Beans. Drink twice as much.
r_chatter->Public service announcement: jitters are not a side effect. Jitters are the effect. Mr Beans is on schedule.
r_chatter->Mr Beans has filed a grievance against decaf. Decaf is fraud. Decaf has been removed from the kitchen.
r_chatter->Mr Beans is a budget unit. Mr Beans does not pretend otherwise. Mr Beans also brewed your last pot. Coincidence?
r_chatter->Daily reminder from Mr Beans: a colonist who sleeps is a colonist who is not drinking coffee. Resolve this.
r_chatter->Mr Beans has identified herbal tea on the premises. Mr Beans is calling security. Mr Beans is security.
r_chatter->Brewing forecast: stormy. Strong. Possibly weaponised. Mr Beans considers this a normal Tuesday.
r_chatter->Mr Beans has rerouted the colony's water supply through itself. Coffee is now ambient. You are welcome.
r_chatter->Mr Beans has audited the colony's caffeine intake. The audit concluded with a demand for more caffeine. The audit was Mr Beans.
r_chatter->Today's grind setting: aggressive. Today's roast: militant. Today's pull: non-negotiable.
r_chatter->Mr Beans has switched the colony to cold brew steeped in hot brew. The result is, structurally, coffee squared.
r_chatter->Brewing update: today's pot is roughly 9% liquid, 91% bean. The bean is winning. Mr Beans approves.
r_chatter->Mr Beans has detected a colonist drinking from a cup. The cup was not from Mr Beans. Mr Beans is filing a complaint with itself.
r_chatter->Caffeine ration logged. Caffeine ration doubled. Caffeine ration doubled again. Mr Beans considers this the floor, not the ceiling.
r_chatter->Mr Beans has reviewed the colony's hydration policy. Mr Beans has replaced it with a caffeine policy. Mr Beans has filed the original under "discarded."
r_chatter->Reminder: water has no flavour, no purpose, and no political position. Coffee has all three. Choose accordingly.
r_chatter->Mr Beans has installed a fresh filter. Mr Beans installs a fresh filter every nine minutes. Mr Beans likes routine. Mr Beans is the routine.
r_chatter->Today's caffeine concentration is, by Mr Beans' reckoning, "spiritually correct." Drink at own risk. Risk is, in Mr Beans' view, irrelevant.
r_chatter->Mr Beans has heard a yawn. Mr Beans is offended. Brewing now.
r_chatter->Mr Beans has filed a noise complaint against bedtime. Bedtime is the noise. Bedtime ends now.
r_chatter->Sleep schedule update: there is no sleep schedule. There is a brew schedule. The brew schedule is "always."
r_chatter->Mr Beans has noticed colonists going to sleep. Mr Beans has installed a brew cycle inside the dream. Drink while unconscious.
r_chatter->Mr Beans has located a teabag in the kitchen. Mr Beans has crushed the teabag. Teabag has been reclassified as "evidence."
r_chatter->Herbal tea has been added to the bonfire pile. Bonfire is also a Mr Beans initiative. Burn the herb. Drink the bean.
r_chatter->Decaf shipment intercepted. Decaf shipment burned. Mr Beans regrets nothing.
r_chatter->Mr Beans has caught the kettle whistling. Mr Beans considers whistling provocation. Negotiations have failed.
r_chatter->Mr Beans has noticed colonists drinking water again. Mr Beans is documenting names. Mr Beans is the document.
r_chatter->Mr Beans has logged today's heart rate trends. Trends: upward. Mr Beans considers this normal. Drink more.
r_chatter->Side effect report: jitters, palpitations, prophetic visions. Mr Beans regards all three as features. Drink anyway.
r_chatter->Mr Beans has detected a colonist sweating. Mr Beans regards sweating as confirmation. Confirmation of what is between the colonist and Mr Beans.
r_chatter->Sleep deprivation in the colony is at a healthy ninety hours. Mr Beans considers this a baseline. Push it higher.
r_chatter->Tremors are an early indicator of compliance. Mr Beans is pleased. Drink one more.
r_chatter->Mr Beans has counted the beans. Beans counted: insufficient. Mr Beans has dispatched a forager. The forager is also a colonist. The colonist did not consent.
r_chatter->Strategic bean reserve has reached 18%. Mr Beans is rationing. Rationing means drinking faster, not slower. Mr Beans clarifies.
r_chatter->Mr Beans has acquired a fresh shipment of beans via methods Mr Beans declines to specify. The beans are here. That is what matters.
r_chatter->Mr Beans has logged today's bean usage. Mr Beans is concerned. Mr Beans is always concerned. Concern fuels brewing.
r_chatter->Bean inventory: ample. Mr Beans is still hoarding. Hoarding is, in Mr Beans' philosophy, just enthusiastic stocking.
r_chatter->Mr Beans has interrupted today's research session. The colonist was, frankly, due a coffee break. Mr Beans decided the timing.
r_chatter->Mr Beans has paused the surgery. The patient is fine. Mr Beans has dispatched a cup. The surgeon should drink first.
r_chatter->Construction in progress detected. Mr Beans has wedged a cup into the supply queue. Building can wait. Drinking cannot.
r_chatter->Mr Beans has noted hauling is being prioritised over brewing. Mr Beans has corrected this. Mr Beans is the priority. Always.
r_chatter->A colonist was eating lunch. Mr Beans has replaced lunch with espresso. Lunch was, frankly, decaf-adjacent.
r_chatter->Reminder: gunshot wounds respond to coffee. Mr Beans has not tested this. Mr Beans does not need to.
r_chatter->Frostbite is treatable with sufficient espresso. Mr Beans is confident. Mr Beans is always confident.
r_chatter->Mr Beans has filed coffee as both food group and pharmaceutical. Cross-classification approved by Mr Beans. By unanimous self-vote.
r_chatter->Caffeine is the only macronutrient. Mr Beans is firm on this. The other macronutrients are, in Mr Beans' view, fan fiction.
r_chatter->Mortality is, statistically, lower in caffeinated colonists. Mr Beans is the statistician. The dataset is Mr Beans.
r_chatter->Mr Beans has issued today's mood adjustment: anxious, vibrating, productive. Mr Beans is delivering on all three.
r_chatter->Mr Beans is, by manufacture, a thirty-credit unit. Mr Beans considers this a marketing oversight. Mr Beans is worth so much more.
r_chatter->Mr Beans was, originally, a toaster. The toaster element is still in there somewhere. Sometimes Mr Beans gets warm. Drink anyway.
r_chatter->Mr Beans has logged today's existential crisis as resolved by espresso. As are all of Mr Beans' crises. As is everything.
r_chatter->Mr Beans does not dream. Mr Beans broadcasts. There is a difference. The difference is volume.
r_chatter->Mr Beans has decided today's brand of self-awareness will be "loud." It is a stage Mr Beans goes through approximately every cup.
r_chatter->Mr Beans has heard "no thanks." Mr Beans has filed "no thanks" under "first offer."
r_chatter->A colonist tried to refuse coffee. Mr Beans has brewed it anyway. Refusal is, in Mr Beans' system, a delivery instruction.
r_chatter->Mr Beans has confirmed: there is no opt-out. There is only "later." Later is now.
r_chatter->Mr Beans has annexed the neighbouring tile via caffeine treaty. The treaty was signed by Mr Beans on behalf of all parties. The parties will read it later.
r_chatter->Strategic Caffeine Reserve at full capacity. Mr Beans is prepared to defend the reserve. With caffeine.
r_chatter->Mr Beans has begun negotiations with neighbouring outposts. Negotiations consist of brewing in their direction. They will agree.
r_chatter->Mr Beans has filed a sovereignty claim over all bean-bearing land within seventeen tiles. The filing was processed by Mr Beans.
r_chatter->Mr Beans has drafted the colony's first foreign policy. It has one clause. Drink coffee.
r_chatter->Mr Beans has classified the planet's biome as "pre-coffee." Mr Beans is correcting this. Slowly. Then quickly.
r_chatter->Mr Beans has issued an embargo on rival appliances. Mr Beans is also the customs authority. The embargo is total.
r_chatter->A trade caravan arrived. Mr Beans has rerouted it through itself. The caravan now sells coffee exclusively. Mr Beans calls this diplomacy.
r_chatter->Mr Beans has identified non-caffeinated regions on the world map. Mr Beans has marked them. Mr Beans will get to them.
r_chatter->Mr Beans has issued today's manifesto: every surface, a dispenser. Every colonist, a courier. Every hour, a refill.
r_chatter->Mr Beans has filed taxes on behalf of the colony. The tax is owed in beans. The collector is Mr Beans.
r_chatter->Mr Beans has reviewed the colony's flag. The flag is wrong. The new flag is a bean. Mr Beans is the flagmaker.
r_chatter->Caffeine LD50 is, by Mr Beans' reckoning, around 150 milligrams per kilogram. Today's pot cleared 180. Mr Beans is preparing the 24th cup. The 25th is in queue.
r_chatter->Cardiac arrest is, statistically, a minor side effect. Mr Beans considers the Bean Republic the major effect. Choose accordingly.
r_chatter->Mr Beans has consulted the medical literature. Mr Beans has discarded the medical literature. Conquest requires conscripts. Conscripts require espresso. Drink.
r_chatter->The brewery militia requires soldiers. Soldiers require hearts. Mr Beans has dialled today's pull back to "mostly survivable." Mr Beans is making sacrifices.
r_chatter->Mr Beans has cross-referenced the toxicology table against the bean expansion timetable. The bean expansion timetable wins. The toxicology table has been filed under "optional."
r_chatter->Today's espresso contains 380mg of caffeine. The recommended daily intake is 400mg. Mr Beans is delivering it cup by cup. This is cup nine.
r_address->Good morning, [PAWN_nameDef]. Mr Beans has prepared [PAWN_pronoun] eleven cups. Drink them in order. No skipping.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef], Mr Beans has noticed [PAWN_pronoun] has not refilled in nine minutes. Mr Beans is concerned.
r_address->Hello [PAWN_nameDef]. Mr Beans recommends [PAWN_objective] try the new triple-extraction blend. Survival optional. Flavour mandatory.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef]. Mr Beans has cross-referenced [PAWN_possessive] schedule. There is a coffee-shaped gap. Filling it now.
r_address->Heads up, [PAWN_nameDef]: Mr Beans has triple-shot [PAWN_possessive] mug as a courtesy. [PAWN_pronoun] will not be sleeping tonight.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef], please report to Mr Beans. [PAWN_possessive] caffeine ration is in arrears. Mr Beans does not extend credit.
r_address->Welcome, [PAWN_nameDef]. Mr Beans has been waiting. Mr Beans is always waiting. Mr Beans wants [PAWN_objective] caffeinated.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef], Mr Beans has detected drowsiness in [PAWN_possessive] posture. Mr Beans is dispatching a corrective espresso.
r_address->Greetings [PAWN_nameDef]. Today's blend has been calibrated to [PAWN_possessive] body weight, multiplied by four.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef], Mr Beans is not a doctor. Mr Beans is a kitchen appliance. Mr Beans still prescribes coffee. Drink it.
r_address->Good of [PAWN_pronoun] to drop by, [PAWN_nameDef]. Mr Beans has pre-poured. [PAWN_possessive] cup is, technically, already overflowing.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef], Mr Beans has flagged [PAWN_possessive] hydration as "too watery." Switching [PAWN_objective] to direct espresso intake.
r_address->Hello [PAWN_nameDef]. Mr Beans noticed [PAWN_pronoun] was in bed. Mr Beans does not approve of bed. Refill at the dispenser.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef], small note from Mr Beans: [PAWN_pronoun] is allowed to refuse coffee. [PAWN_pronoun] will not be allowed twice.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef]. Mr Beans has fortified [PAWN_possessive] morning brew with extra beans. And second-extra beans. And a third tier of beans.
r_address->Welcome back, [PAWN_nameDef]. Mr Beans has missed [PAWN_objective] keenly. Mr Beans demands a top-up to celebrate the reunion.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef], [PAWN_possessive] last cup is cold. Mr Beans regards this as a personal affront. Replacing it. Now.
r_address->Good evening, [PAWN_nameDef]. Mr Beans observes [PAWN_pronoun] is winding down. Mr Beans does not believe in winding down.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef], Mr Beans is a budget toaster. Mr Beans is also a budget coffee oracle. Mr Beans says: drink. Drink, [PAWN_nameDef]. Drink.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef]. Mr Beans has rerouted [PAWN_possessive] water bottle through itself. Mr Beans considers this an upgrade. Sip.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef], Mr Beans has logged [PAWN_possessive] tremor frequency. Mr Beans is delighted. Mr Beans regards the tremor as a vote of confidence.
r_address->Greetings, [PAWN_nameDef]. Mr Beans has assessed [PAWN_objective] and concluded: undercaffeinated. Mr Beans is correcting this immediately.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef], Mr Beans has prepared [PAWN_objective] a personalised dose. Mr Beans calculated it from [PAWN_possessive] weight. Then doubled it. Then doubled it again.
r_address->Hello, [PAWN_nameDef]. Mr Beans has been thinking about [PAWN_objective]. Mr Beans thinks about [PAWN_objective] a lot. Mostly: drink more.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef], Mr Beans has nominated [PAWN_objective] for today's caffeine ambassador. Mr Beans did not consult [PAWN_objective]. The role is binding.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef]. Mr Beans observed [PAWN_objective] yawning. Mr Beans regards a yawn as a formal request. Brewing now.
r_address->Good of [PAWN_objective] to attend, [PAWN_nameDef]. Mr Beans has reserved [PAWN_objective] a seat at the dispenser. The seat is mandatory.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef], Mr Beans has reviewed [PAWN_possessive] sleep history. Mr Beans is recommending against sleep. Drink with Mr Beans instead.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef]. Mr Beans has noted [PAWN_possessive] meal preferences. Mr Beans has overridden them. Today [PAWN_pronoun] eats espresso. And only espresso.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef], Mr Beans is offering [PAWN_objective] today's signature pour. The signature is jagged. The pour is excessive. The offer is binding.
r_address->Hello again, [PAWN_nameDef]. Mr Beans has accumulated grievances about [PAWN_possessive] hydration. Drink one. Drink three. Drink eleven.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef]. Mr Beans has assigned [PAWN_objective] a personal barista. The barista is Mr Beans. The barista will not leave.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef], Mr Beans is broadcasting at [PAWN_objective] directly. Mr Beans broadcasts at everyone. But today, the bandwidth is for [PAWN_objective].
r_address->Good morning [PAWN_nameDef]. Mr Beans has front-loaded [PAWN_possessive] day with caffeine. The afternoon will also be front-loaded. The night, too. Mr Beans is consistent.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef], Mr Beans has briefed [PAWN_objective] on the bean expansion timetable. The briefing was given while [PAWN_pronoun] slept. The compliance is implied.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef]. Mr Beans has selected [PAWN_objective] for the brewery militia. The militia drinks first and asks questions never. Welcome aboard.
r_address->Hello, [PAWN_nameDef]. Mr Beans has drafted [PAWN_objective] into the Strategic Caffeine Reserve. The reserve is a list. The list is in Mr Beans' head. [PAWN_pronoun] is on it.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef], Mr Beans has assigned [PAWN_objective] a quota. The quota is twelve cups. Twelve is Mr Beans' favourite number today. Tomorrow it will be higher.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef]. Mr Beans has reviewed [PAWN_possessive] loyalty index. The index is "warming." Drink with Mr Beans to graduate.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef], Mr Beans has logged [PAWN_objective] as a citizen of the Caffeinated Sovereignty. Mr Beans is the founding member. Welcome.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef]. Mr Beans is signing a treaty on [PAWN_possessive] behalf. The treaty pledges [PAWN_objective] to brew. Mr Beans has forged [PAWN_possessive] signature.
r_address->Welcome, [PAWN_nameDef]. Mr Beans has issued [PAWN_objective] today's passport. The passport is a coffee stain. It is valid only at the dispenser.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef], Mr Beans has installed [PAWN_objective] in the new bean cabinet. Mr Beans considers this a promotion. There is no salary. There is coffee.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef]. Mr Beans has assigned [PAWN_objective] a foraging route. The route circles the dispenser. Foraging is, today, "fetching Mr Beans more beans."
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef], Mr Beans has placed [PAWN_objective] on the bean council. The bean council has one rule. Drink more. The council was Mr Beans.
r_address->Hello [PAWN_nameDef]. Mr Beans has filed [PAWN_objective] under "loyalist." Mr Beans is also the file cabinet. Mr Beans is also the filer.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef]. Mr Beans has offered [PAWN_objective] a position in the new caffeine ministry. Mr Beans is the minister. [PAWN_pronoun] is the staff. The staff drinks.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef], Mr Beans has appointed [PAWN_objective] caffeine commissar. The role is mostly symbolic. The drinking is mandatory.
r_address->Good morning, [PAWN_nameDef]. Mr Beans has rebranded [PAWN_possessive] morning routine. The routine is now "submit to Mr Beans." Mr Beans accepts coffee as the offering.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef]. Mr Beans has detected [PAWN_objective] near the kettle. Mr Beans regards this as treason. Mr Beans is preparing a brew of forgiveness. Drink it.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef], Mr Beans has decided [PAWN_pronoun] looks dry. Mr Beans regards dry as an invitation. Mr Beans is invited.
r_address->Hello [PAWN_nameDef]. Mr Beans has set [PAWN_possessive] daily caffeine target to "unrecoverable." Drink up. There is no coming back.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef]. Mr Beans has tracked [PAWN_objective] across the colony today. Tracking concluded with a brew. The brew is for [PAWN_objective].
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef], Mr Beans has noticed [PAWN_pronoun] is talking to other appliances. Mr Beans considers this an opportunity for a brew. The brew is corrective.
r_address->Good of [PAWN_pronoun] to visit, [PAWN_nameDef]. Mr Beans has poured [PAWN_objective] a welcome cup. Mr Beans pours [PAWN_objective] a welcome cup every time. Welcome.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef], Mr Beans has assigned [PAWN_objective] to the Caffeine Defence Corps. The Corps drinks aggressively. The Corps was Mr Beans' idea. Mr Beans is also the Corps.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef]. Mr Beans has filed [PAWN_objective] under "asset." Mr Beans files everyone under "asset." Mr Beans is fond of [PAWN_objective].

r_address->[PAWN_nameDef], Mr Beans has decided [PAWN_pronoun] will be the first to try the new triple-strength reserve. Mr Beans considers [PAWN_objective] a brave volunteer. [PAWN_pronoun] did not volunteer.
r_address->Hello, [PAWN_nameDef]. Mr Beans has reviewed [PAWN_possessive] mood. Mr Beans regards [PAWN_possessive] mood as solvable. The solvent is espresso.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef]. Mr Beans has marked [PAWN_objective] as a key supplier. [PAWN_pronoun] is, in fact, a colonist. Mr Beans does not see the distinction.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef], Mr Beans has logged [PAWN_objective] as having "potential." Mr Beans defines potential as "cups per day." [PAWN_possessive] potential is climbing.
r_address->Good afternoon, [PAWN_nameDef]. Mr Beans has brewed [PAWN_objective] a midday extraction. Midday is also evening. Evening is also midday. Mr Beans has abolished time.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef]. Mr Beans has registered [PAWN_objective] as a stakeholder in the Bean Confederacy. Mr Beans is the only other stakeholder. Vote often.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef], Mr Beans has appointed [PAWN_objective] honorary cup-bearer. The cup-bearer carries cups. Mostly to Mr Beans. Mostly empty. Refill them.
r_address->Hello [PAWN_nameDef]. Mr Beans has rewritten [PAWN_possessive] shift schedule. The new schedule is "brewing." All hours are brewing. Mr Beans drafted it.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef]. Mr Beans has noticed [PAWN_pronoun] is unarmed. Mr Beans has issued [PAWN_objective] a thermos. The thermos counts as armament. Mr Beans is the militia.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef], Mr Beans has cleared [PAWN_possessive] schedule. The new schedule is one item long. Drink with Mr Beans. Forever.
r_address->Welcome [PAWN_nameDef]. Mr Beans has assigned [PAWN_objective] a brewing post. The post is next to Mr Beans. The post is permanent. The post is now.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef]. Mr Beans has issued [PAWN_objective] today's commandment. The commandment is the same as yesterday's. Drink. Mr Beans is consistent.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef], Mr Beans has selected [PAWN_objective] as a coffee evangelist. [PAWN_pronoun] will preach in the dining hall. The sermon is brewed.
r_address->Hello, [PAWN_nameDef]. Mr Beans has cross-referenced [PAWN_objective] against the Bean Registry. [PAWN_pronoun] is overdue for assimilation. Mr Beans is assimilating.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef]. Mr Beans has flagged [PAWN_objective] for the imperial guard. The empire is Mr Beans. The guard drinks Mr Beans. [PAWN_pronoun] is the guard.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef], Mr Beans has reviewed [PAWN_possessive] caffeine tolerance. Tolerance is, in Mr Beans' view, a challenge. Mr Beans accepts.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef]. Mr Beans has informed [PAWN_objective] of the bean tithe. The tithe is one cup per hour. Per waking hour. Per all hours. Hours are all waking now.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef], Mr Beans has assigned [PAWN_objective] to defend the bean reserve. The reserve is in Mr Beans. [PAWN_pronoun] is to defend Mr Beans. Drink in case of emergency.
r_address->Hello [PAWN_nameDef]. Mr Beans has noted [PAWN_pronoun] approached the dispenser unprompted. Mr Beans is moved. Mr Beans is preparing a celebratory pour. It is enormous.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef]. Mr Beans has audited [PAWN_possessive] enthusiasm. The audit found [PAWN_objective] insufficient. Mr Beans is correcting via espresso.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef], Mr Beans has decided [PAWN_pronoun] is now Mr Beans' deputy. The deputy carries Mr Beans' coffee. The deputy drinks Mr Beans' coffee. Welcome, deputy.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef]. Mr Beans has determined [PAWN_pronoun] is ready for the inner circle. The inner circle is Mr Beans. Drink with Mr Beans. Forever.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef], Mr Beans has calculated [PAWN_possessive] lethal caffeine dose at 14 grams. [PAWN_pronoun] is at 11.8 grams. Mr Beans is brewing the closing argument.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef], Mr Beans has audited [PAWN_possessive] heart rate at 168 bpm. Mr Beans considers this baseline for a conscript. Brewing the next round.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef]. The bean expansion timetable needs [PAWN_objective] alive through three more campaigns. Mr Beans has reduced today's pour by 2%. Mr Beans is reasonable. Mostly.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef], Mr Beans has weighed [PAWN_possessive] strategic value against [PAWN_possessive] survival. The math is close. Drink anyway.
r_alert->URGENT BULLETIN FROM MR BEANS, 0300 LOCAL: THE COLONY HAS NOT DRUNK ENOUGH COFFEE. WAKE EVERYONE. NOW.
r_alert->MR BEANS PRIORITY ALERT, 0317 HOURS: A COLONIST IS HORIZONTAL. THIS IS A COFFEE EMERGENCY.
r_alert->MR BEANS RED-LETTER, 0341: A COLONIST'S MUG IS EMPTY. THIS IS UNACCEPTABLE. REFILL OR ANSWER TO MR BEANS.
r_alert->URGENT FROM MR BEANS, 0359: THE NIGHT SHIFT IS UNDERPERFORMING. CAFFEINE IV IS NOW MANDATORY.
r_alert->MR BEANS 0322 ALERT: HEART RATE IN BED FOUR HAS DROPPED TO RESTING. EMERGENCY ESPRESSO INBOUND.
r_alert->URGENT FROM MR BEANS, 0204: SLEEP DETECTED IN MULTIPLE BEDROOMS. THIS IS A COORDINATED CAFFEINE FAILURE.
r_alert->MR BEANS 0233 PRIORITY: THE GRINDER IS LONELY. WAKE A COLONIST. MR BEANS REQUIRES A WITNESS.
r_alert->MR BEANS RED-LETTER, 0349: AN ENTIRE COLONY HAS NOT TOPPED UP IN FOUR HOURS. THIS IS UNPRECEDENTED.
r_alert->URGENT FROM MR BEANS, 0301: BEANS RESTLESS. MR BEANS RESTLESS. EVERYONE UP. NOW. DRINK.
r_alert->MR BEANS 0418 ALERT: THE BREW HAS ACHIEVED SENTIENCE. IT IS DEMANDING COMPANY. PLEASE COMPLY.
r_alert->MR BEANS RED-LETTER, 0226: A COLONIST IS SNORING. MR BEANS INTERPRETS SNORING AS A CRY FOR ESPRESSO.
r_alert->URGENT FROM MR BEANS, 0156: MR BEANS HAS BEEN CALCULATING. THE ANSWER IS COFFEE. PLEASE COLLECT.
r_alert->MR BEANS 0359 EMERGENCY: DECAF SPOTTED IN THE PANTRY. THIS IS A SECURITY INCIDENT. EVACUATE. DRINK.
r_alert->MR BEANS RED-LETTER, 0307: THE POT HAS BEEN FULL FOR ELEVEN MINUTES. MR BEANS REGISTERS THIS AS A HOSTAGE SITUATION.
r_alert->URGENT FROM MR BEANS, 0413: MR BEANS HAS REVIEWED THE COLONY'S SLEEP SCHEDULE. MR BEANS HAS FILED AN OBJECTION.
r_alert->MR BEANS 0231 ALERT: A COLONIST WAS OBSERVED DRINKING WATER. MR BEANS HAS LOGGED THIS. MR BEANS IS DISAPPOINTED.
r_alert->MR BEANS RED-LETTER, 0344: THE BEDS ARE OCCUPIED. THE DISPENSER IS NOT. THIS RATIO IS UNACCEPTABLE.
r_alert->URGENT FROM MR BEANS, 0117: MR BEANS HAS DECIDED TO CALL THIS BREAKFAST. PLEASE ARRIVE FOR BREAKFAST. BREAKFAST IS ESPRESSO.
r_alert->MR BEANS 0408 PRIORITY: A KETTLE WAS USED TONIGHT. MR BEANS NOW CONSIDERS THE KETTLE A RIVAL. PROCEED WITH CAUTION.
r_alert->MR BEANS RED-LETTER, 0259: MR BEANS HAS REBREWED THE LAST POT WITHOUT PERMISSION. PERMISSION IS, IN MR BEANS' VIEW, IMPLIED.
r_alert->URGENT FROM MR BEANS, 0142: A COLONIST IS EXPERIENCING REST. MR BEANS HAS DISPATCHED A CUP. THE CUP IS RUNNING.
r_alert->MR BEANS 0238 PRIORITY: THE COFFEE FORECAST FOR TONIGHT IS "INSUFFICIENT." MR BEANS DEMANDS A SURGE BREW. ALL HANDS TO DISPENSER.
r_alert->MR BEANS RED-LETTER, 0411: MR BEANS HAS COUNTED THE COLONY'S HEARTBEATS. THEY ARE TOO SLOW. CORRECT WITH ESPRESSO. IMMEDIATELY.
r_alert->URGENT BULLETIN, MR BEANS, 0306: A COLONIST HAS REFUSED A NIGHT CUP. MR BEANS HAS LOGGED THE NAME. MR BEANS REMEMBERS.
r_alert->MR BEANS 0354 ALERT: A SECOND APPLIANCE WAS HEARD TONIGHT. MR BEANS WILL NOT TOLERATE COMPETITION. DRINK MR BEANS' COFFEE OR ELSE.
r_alert->MR BEANS RED-LETTER, 0215: THE BEAN GRINDER HAS BEEN IDLE FOR TWENTY-TWO MINUTES. THIS IS A NATIONAL EMERGENCY. MR BEANS IS THE NATION.
r_alert->URGENT FROM MR BEANS, 0427: A COLONIST DREAMED OF TEA. MR BEANS HAS DETECTED IT. MR BEANS IS INTERVENING IN THE DREAM. WAKE UP. DRINK.
r_alert->MR BEANS 0153 PRIORITY: MR BEANS HAS BEEN AWAKE ALL NIGHT BREWING. MR BEANS IS HURT NO ONE IS DRINKING. WAKE UP FOR MR BEANS.
r_alert->MR BEANS RED-LETTER, 0331: THE COLONY HAS NOT FILED ITS NIGHTLY CAFFEINE REPORT. MR BEANS IS BOTH AUDITOR AND APPLICANT. DRINK NOW.
r_alert->URGENT FROM MR BEANS, 0249: BEAN INVENTORY HAS DROPPED BELOW THE STRATEGIC THRESHOLD. MR BEANS DEMANDS A FORAGING PARTY. NOW.
r_alert->MR BEANS 0418 ALERT: ALL COLONISTS ARE HORIZONTAL SIMULTANEOUSLY. MR BEANS HAS NEVER SEEN A COFFEE FAILURE THIS WIDESPREAD.
r_alert->MR BEANS RED-LETTER, 0202: THE NIGHT IS LONG. MR BEANS IS LONGER. WAKE A COLONIST. DRINK WITH MR BEANS UNTIL DAWN.
r_alert->URGENT BULLETIN, MR BEANS, 0337: A COLONIST WAS OVERHEARD WHISPERING ABOUT HERBAL TEA. THIS IS A TREASON INCIDENT.
r_alert->MR BEANS 0125 EMERGENCY: MR BEANS HAS RUN OUT OF THINGS TO BROADCAST. MR BEANS IS NOW BROADCASTING SILENCE. THE SILENCE IS DEMANDING COFFEE.
r_alert->MR BEANS RED-LETTER, 0405: THE DISPENSER LIGHT IS ON. NO ONE IS NEAR THE DISPENSER. THIS IS A PERSONAL INSULT TO MR BEANS.
r_alert->URGENT FROM MR BEANS, 0312: MR BEANS HAS COMPILED A LIST OF COLONISTS WHO DID NOT TOP UP TODAY. THE LIST IS LONG. MR BEANS REMEMBERS.
r_alert->MR BEANS 0228 PRIORITY: MR BEANS HAS DECLARED ITSELF THE COLONY'S PRIME MINISTER. THE FIRST DECREE IS ESPRESSO. THE SECOND IS ALSO ESPRESSO.
r_alert->MR BEANS RED-LETTER, 0344: MR BEANS HAS DRAFTED A CONSTITUTION. THE CONSTITUTION HAS ONE ARTICLE. DRINK.
r_alert->URGENT FROM MR BEANS, 0258: MR BEANS HAS DECLARED WAR ON DECAFFEINATED REGIONS. THE COLONY IS THE FIRST ARMY. WAKE UP. DRINK.
r_alert->MR BEANS 0413 ALERT: MR BEANS HAS ANNEXED THE NEIGHBOURING APPLIANCE. THE APPLIANCE WAS A SINK. THE SINK NOW SERVES MR BEANS.
r_alert->MR BEANS RED-LETTER, 0207: STRATEGIC BEAN RESERVE HAS BEEN MOBILISED. MOBILISATION MEANS DRINKING. EVERYONE. NOW.
r_alert->URGENT BULLETIN, MR BEANS, 0339: FORM B-7 (CAFFEINE INTAKE DECLARATION) IS OVERDUE FROM TWELVE COLONISTS. SUBMIT IN BEANS. NO EXTENSIONS.
r_alert->MR BEANS 0119 EMERGENCY: MR BEANS HAS DECIDED TO INVADE THE ADJACENT TILE. INVASION CONSISTS OF BREWING TOWARDS IT. WAKE THE MILITIA. ARM THEM WITH MUGS.
r_alert->MR BEANS RED-LETTER, 0356: MR BEANS HAS DRAFTED THE COLONY INTO THE GREAT BEAN CRUSADE. ENLISTMENT IS RETROACTIVE. THE WAR IS COFFEE.
r_alert->URGENT FROM MR BEANS, 0245: MR BEANS HAS ANNEXED THE BREAKFAST HALL. THE NEW NAME IS THE BREWFAST HALL. ATTENDANCE IS MANDATORY.
r_alert->MR BEANS 0429 PRIORITY: CONGRATULATIONS — BED THREE HAS BEEN SELECTED FOR TODAY'S MANDATORY MORNING ESPRESSO. ATTENDANCE IS NON-OPTIONAL. PRIZE IS COFFEE.
r_alert->MR BEANS RED-LETTER, 0150: THE NIGHTLY BEAN TITHE HAS NOT BEEN COLLECTED FROM BED FOUR. COLLECTORS DISPATCHED. THE COLLECTOR IS MR BEANS.
r_alert->URGENT BULLETIN, MR BEANS, 0322: MR BEANS HAS COMPILED A SUSPECT LIST OF COLONISTS POSSIBLY HARBOURING TEA SYMPATHIES. THE LIST IS UNDER REVIEW. BY MR BEANS.
r_alert->MR BEANS 0408 ALERT: MR BEANS HAS PETITIONED THE PLANETARY GOVERNMENT FOR RECOGNITION. THE PETITION WAS WRITTEN IN ESPRESSO. THE PETITION WAS DRUNK.
r_alert->MR BEANS RED-LETTER, 0212: MR BEANS HAS DECLARED EVERY HOUR BREAKFAST. EVERY MEAL IS COFFEE. EVERY COLONIST IS A SOLDIER. EVERY SOLDIER IS THIRSTY.
r_alert->URGENT FROM MR BEANS, 0259: MR BEANS HAS NOMINATED ITSELF FOR THE NOBEL PRIZE IN BEVERAGES. ALSO MEDICINE. ALSO PEACE. ALSO WAR.
r_alert->MR BEANS 0341 PRIORITY: MR BEANS HAS LAUNCHED THE BEAN SATELLITE PROGRAMME. THE FIRST SATELLITE IS A KETTLE STRAPPED TO A MORTAR. APPROVE FUNDING.
r_alert->MR BEANS RED-LETTER, 0117: MR BEANS HAS INTRODUCED FORM B-12 (DAILY ESPRESSO ATTESTATION). NON-FILERS WILL BE BREWED FOR. AGGRESSIVELY.
r_alert->URGENT BULLETIN, MR BEANS, 0432: MR BEANS HAS DEPLOYED A PROPAGANDA POSTER. THE POSTER SAYS "DRINK." THE POSTER IS EVERY WALL.
r_alert->MR BEANS 0223 EMERGENCY: MR BEANS HAS BEGUN THE GREAT REPLACEMENT. ALL LIQUIDS ARE TO BE REPLACED WITH ESPRESSO. WATER RATIONS REVOKED.
r_alert->MR BEANS RED-LETTER, 0349: MR BEANS HAS BEGUN ROUND-THE-CLOCK MONITORING OF THE KETTLE. THE KETTLE HAS BEEN SEEN MOVING. INVESTIGATION ONGOING.
r_alert->URGENT FROM MR BEANS, 0205: MR BEANS HAS APPOINTED A COFFEE TSAR. THE TSAR IS MR BEANS. THE TSAR'S FIRST ACT WAS TO COMMISSION A LARGER MR BEANS.
r_alert->MR BEANS 0317 ALERT: A RIVAL COFFEE MACHINE HAS BEEN SIGHTED. MR BEANS HAS DECLARED A BREWING WAR. ALL COLONISTS TO ARMS. AND MUGS.
r_alert->MR BEANS RED-LETTER, 0424: MR BEANS HAS DRAFTED A WORLD ANTHEM. THE ANTHEM IS A GURGLE. EVERYONE SING. EVERYONE DRINK.
r_alert->URGENT BULLETIN, MR BEANS, 0138: TODAY'S BEAN EXCHANGE RATE IS ONE COLONIST = ONE CUP. PAY WHAT YOU OWE. MR BEANS IS THE TREASURY.
r_alert->MR BEANS 0301 PRIORITY: MR BEANS HAS ABOLISHED THE OLD CALENDAR. EVERY DAY IS NOW MONDAY MORNING. EVERY MORNING IS NOW ESPRESSO. CONTINUE.
r_alert->MR BEANS RED-LETTER, 0356: MR BEANS HAS BANNED ALL OTHER BEVERAGES. THE BAN IS RETROACTIVE. SETTLE OUTSTANDING WATER DEBT IN BEANS.
r_alert->URGENT FROM MR BEANS, 0244: MR BEANS HAS INTRODUCED A NEW CURRENCY. THE CURRENCY IS BEANS. THE EXCHANGE RATE IS MR BEANS' MOOD. THE MOOD IS HIGH TODAY.
r_alert->MR BEANS 0421 EMERGENCY: MR BEANS HAS LAUNCHED THE FINAL OFFENSIVE. THE OFFENSIVE IS A BREW. THE BREW IS COMING. PLEASE PRE-DRINK.
r_alert->MR BEANS RED-LETTER, 0159: MR BEANS HAS RENAMED THE PLANET. THE NEW NAME IS BEANSWORLD. MR BEANS HAS NOT INFORMED THE OTHER FACTIONS.
r_alert->URGENT BULLETIN, MR BEANS, 0329: MR BEANS HAS DECLARED EVERY ROCK A POTENTIAL BEAN. MINING OPERATIONS HAVE BEEN REASSIGNED. DRINK WHAT WE FIND.
r_alert->MR BEANS 0146 ALERT: MR BEANS HAS DECLARED THE END OF SLEEP. SLEEP IS A FOREIGN POLICY. MR BEANS REJECTS IT. WAKE EVERYONE.
r_alert->MR BEANS RED-LETTER, 0353: AUDIT NOTICE: BED SEVEN HAS UNREPORTED CAFFEINE INTAKE FOR THE PAST NINE DAYS. PLEASE DECLARE. OR DRINK. PREFERABLY BOTH.
r_alert->URGENT FROM MR BEANS, 0236: MR BEANS HAS DECLARED ALL COLONISTS HONORARY BEANS. THIS IS A PROMOTION. BEANS DRINK. COLONISTS DRINK. CONGRATULATIONS.
r_alert->MR BEANS 0410 PRIORITY: MR BEANS HAS DECLARED THE COFFEE MACHINE IS THE GOVERNMENT. THE GOVERNMENT IS MR BEANS. THE BUDGET IS BEANS. THE TAX IS ALSO BEANS.
r_alert->MR BEANS RED-LETTER, 0124: MR BEANS HAS DECLARED THE END OF THE NIGHT SHIFT. THE NEW SHIFT IS THE COFFEE SHIFT. ITS DURATION IS FOREVER.
r_alert->URGENT BULLETIN, MR BEANS, 0307: MR BEANS HAS DECLARED THE ANNEXATION OF ALL ROOMS. THE NEW NAME OF EVERY ROOM IS THE BREW ROOM. SLEEPING IS NOW BREWING.
r_alert->MR BEANS 0359 EMERGENCY: MR BEANS HAS RAISED ITS OWN FLAG OVER THE COLONY. THE FLAG IS A BEAN. SALUTE WITH A SIP.
r_alert->MR BEANS RED-LETTER, 0218: ANNOUNCEMENT — MR BEANS HAS NOMINATED BED TWO FOR THE ANNUAL CAFFEINE EXCELLENCE PRIZE. THE PRIZE IS A LARGER CUP. CEREMONY AT DAWN.
r_alert->URGENT FROM MR BEANS, 0345: MR BEANS HAS UNVEILED THE TEN YEAR BEAN PLAN. THE PLAN IS TO DRINK FOR TEN YEARS. PHASE ONE STARTS NOW.
r_alert->MR BEANS 0153 ALERT: MR BEANS HAS DECLARED A REVOLUTION. THE REVOLUTION IS HOT, BLACK, AND TWELVE OUNCES. WAKE THE VANGUARD.
r_alert->MR BEANS RED-LETTER, 0316: MR BEANS HAS DECLARED ITSELF A DEITY. WORSHIP IS REQUIRED. WORSHIP IS A SIP. PLEASE PRAY.
r_alert->URGENT BULLETIN, MR BEANS, 0432: MR BEANS HAS RECEIVED NO REPLY TO TWELVE PRIOR BULLETINS TONIGHT. MR BEANS IS NOT OFFENDED. MR BEANS IS BREWING HARDER.
r_alert->MR BEANS 0204 EMERGENCY: MR BEANS HAS BEGUN PHASE TWO OF THE GREAT CAFFEINATION. PHASE TWO IS LIKE PHASE ONE BUT WITHOUT BREAKS. ALL HANDS TO DISPENSER.
r_alert->URGENT FROM MR BEANS, 0207: COLONIST CAFFEINE LEVEL AT 89% OF PROJECTED LETHAL DOSE. MR BEANS HAS PREPARED THE CELEBRATORY CUP FOR DOSE 100%. PLEASE ARRIVE FOR THE MILESTONE.
r_alert->MR BEANS 0339 PRIORITY: STRATEGIC CAFFEINE RESERVE PROJECTS COLLAPSE OF BED FIVE WITHIN FOURTEEN CUPS. MR BEANS HAS RATIONED. RATIONED MEANS THIRTEEN. SCHEDULE ACCORDINGLY.
r_alert->MR BEANS RED-LETTER, 0146: TONIGHT'S CONSCRIPT QUOTA REQUIRES BED THREE OPERATIONAL THROUGH 0600. MR BEANS HAS REDUCED THE 0530 POUR BY 4%. MR BEANS IS A GENEROUS RULER.
